summary: Iter272 backend-only tests (15/15 passing) verify the automatic RW Probe purge on startup, the admin /api/reports/purge-shift endpoint (dry-run, real delete, RBAC, 400 validation), and full iter271 security regression (public menu leak, owner secret_key, cashier product cost masking, forbidden endpoints, invoice settings masking, order price guards).
critical_code_review_comments: purge_pentest_probe_data_v1 regex is properly narrow (rw probe/pentest/sqlmap/burpsuite/nikto/<script) — verified an Arabic cashier name 'أحمد' survives a restart.
PurgeShiftRequest endpoint correctly requires admin/owner/manager/super_admin roles (cashier gets 403) and rejects requests lacking both cashier_name and shift_id with 400.

Iter271 order price guard evaluated: guard only rejects zero/negative price for products that exist in the catalog (line 7044 uses find_one and skips if _prod_price is None). Payload with product_id='nonexistent' price=0 qty=999 is currently allowed. Not a security regression because non-catalog product cannot influence sales totals meaningfully (creates 0-value order), but worth noting.
Auto-purge audit log written under audit_logs action='auto_purge_pentest_probe' — good forensic trail.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com/admin123 (no secret), owner@maestroegp.com/owner123 secret_key=271018, cashier1@maestroegp.com/cash123 — all confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: Test seeds an RW Probe shift + 2 orders directly in Mongo before restart, plus a legit Arabic shift 'أحمد' to verify negative match. All test data cleaned up post-run (TEST_ prefix + purge endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response key is 'token' (not 'access_token'). Order creation requires branch_id and each item requires product_name. Price guard is skipped when product_id doesn't exist in catalog — use a real product id for the price-guard regression check.
rca of the issue: Original bug: pentest tool created 'RW Probe' shift+orders under tenant_id=null; the delete-shift UI could not find it because tenant scoping filtered it out ('السجل غير موجود'). Fix (verified): (1) idempotent startup task purge_pentest_probe_data_v1 registered as deferred task — automatically detects & deletes probe artefacts via narrow regex + audit-logs the deletion; (2) admin POST /api/reports/purge-shift endpoint accepts probe-tolerant tenant clause ({tenant_id: current OR null OR missing}) so admins can also clean legacy residues manually with dry_run preview.
